Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 199 

RDLGY_CHRG_AMT 

LABEL: Radiology charge amount (excluding MRI) ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for radiology costs (including oncology, excluding MRI) 
related to a beneficiary's stay. 

SHORT NAME: RDLGYAMT 

LONG NAME: RDLGY_CHRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the revenue
